pi_items.source: Verified in setup_task.sh which creates this directory, and in export_result.sh which defines it as OUTPUT_DIR and searches for the output file there.
Verified in export_result.sh, which explicitly sets EXPECTED_FILE to this filename and checks for its existence.
Verified in verifier.py which contains the condition `if width >= 400 and height >= 300:` to award points.
Verified in verifier.py which contains the condition `if width >= 400 and height >= 300:` to award points.
Verified in verifier.py which checks `if size_bytes > 1024:` to award points, equating to >1 KB.

privileged_info_summary: The agent must create an image in OpenToonz and export it to the exact directory /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/test_card. The primarily expected filename is testcard.png, though alternatives are partially accepted. The evaluation script explicitly validates that the final exported image has a minimum width of 400 pixels, a minimum height of 300 pixels, and a file size strictly greater than 1 KB (1024 bytes). Furthermore, the validation checks that the image contains at least two unique colors and >0.5% non-background coverage to confirm it is not blank.
